results.title: PostHog
results.description: PostHog is an open-source platform for customer infrastructure, equipping developers with tools for product analytics, web analytics, feature flags, session replay, A/B testing, error tracking, surveys, LLM observability, and data warehousing.

results.title: PostHog
results.description: PostHog is an open-source Product OS platform providing product analytics, session replay, feature flags, and A/B testing to help teams understand users and improve their products.

results.title: PostHog iOS
results.description: PostHog iOS is a library for integrating PostHog's product analytics, feature flagging, and session recording capabilities into iOS applications.

results.title: PostHog
results.description: PostHog is an all-in-one, open-source platform providing product analytics, web analytics, session replays, feature flags, experiments, error tracking, surveys, data warehousing, data pipelines, and LLM observability for building successful products.

results.title: PostHog Go
results.description: A Go client library for PostHog, enabling developers to capture events, identify users, and manage feature flags within their Go applications.

results.title: PostHog Python
results.description: PostHog Python is the official client library for integrating with and sending data to the PostHog analytics platform from Python applications.

results.title: PostHog Android SDK
results.description: PostHog Android is an SDK for integrating PostHog's product analytics and feature flagging into Android applications.

results.title: PostHog Flutter SDK
results.description: PostHog Flutter is a client-side library for integrating PostHog analytics into Flutter applications, enabling event tracking and feature flag management.

results.title: PostHog Feature Flags
results.description: The PostHog Feature Flags API provides endpoints to create, read, update, and delete feature flags, and to evaluate their status for users within applications.

results.title: PostHog
results.description: The official repository for the PostHog website, containing all written content, visuals, product features, documentation, blogs, case studies, tutorials, and the handbook, along with interactive features like Q&A, job listings, and a pricing calculator.

results.title: PostHog JS
results.description: A monorepo containing multiple packages to integrate with Posthog using JavaScript, including browser, Node.js, and React Native SDKs.

results.title: Postgrator CLI
results.description: A command-line tool for version controlling SQL database migrations using plain SQL files, supporting PostgreSQL, MySQL, and SQL Server, with undo functionality.

results.title: Postmark CLI
results.description: A CLI tool for managing Postmark templates, sending emails, and fetching servers, useful for CI/CD integration.

results.title: MailHog
results.description: MailHog is an email testing tool for developers that allows them to capture outgoing emails, view them in a web UI, and optionally release them to real SMTP servers.

results.title: PostHog JS Lite
results.description: This repository contains code that has been moved to the main posthog-js repository for all PostHog JavaScript tracking needs.

results.title: Deskhog
results.description: DeskHog is an open-source, 3D printed, palm-sized developer toy that can be tinkered with, adapted, and expanded with various games and apps.

results.title: Purgo CLI
results.description: Purgo CLI is a modern, powerful command-line interface tool for cleaning build artifacts, dependencies, and caches from JavaScript/TypeScript projects.

results.title: Pop CLI
results.description: An all-in-one tool for Polkadot development, simplifying tasks like local network deployment, smart contract development, and runtime building.

results.title: PROS CLI
results.description: PROS CLI is a Python-based command-line tool for managing projects within the PROS development environment for the VEX EDR Platform, handling tasks like downloading templates and uploading binaries.

results.title: Pgcli
results.description: Postgres CLI with autocompletion and syntax highlighting

results.title: Hostinger API CLI
results.description: Hostinger API CLI

results.title: Codecov CLI
results.description: CodecovCLI is a command-line interface tool that allows users to interact with Codecov directly from their terminal or CI platform, enabling features like saving commits, creating reports, and uploading coverage.

results.title: Cypress MailHog
results.description: A collection of Cypress commands designed to interact with MailHog, providing functionalities to fetch, filter, and manage emails within your Cypress test suite.

results.title: CoAP CLI
results.description: CoAP-CLI is a command-line interface for the Constrained Application Protocol (CoAP), built on Node.js and node-coap, allowing users to perform GET, PUT, POST, and DELETE requests.

results.title: PostgreSQL HLL
results.description: A PostgreSQL extension that provides a HyperLogLog (HLL) data type for efficient, approximate distinct value counting, offering tunable precision and optimized memory usage through a hierarchy of internal algorithms.

results.title: PostGrid
results.description: PostGrid is an API that enables automated transactional mailings by sending letters, postcards, and cheques, and provides address verification services with SDKs for integration.

results.title: Postgresql Commands
results.description: Postgresql Commands provides command builders for interacting with PostgreSQL via CLI, which can be used to construct standard or tokio commands.

results.title: Hono CLI
results.description: Hono CLI is a command-line interface for Hono applications, designed for both human developers and AI, providing specialized commands for documentation, testing, serving, and optimization.

results.title: Intellireading CLI
results.description: Intellireading CLI is a standalone tool and Python library that accelerates reading by metaguiding EPUB, KEPUB, XHTML, and HTML files, aiding focus and speed for users with dyslexia, ADHD, or anyone seeking improved reading efficiency.

results.title: GitHub CLI
results.description: The GitHub CLI (`gh`) brings GitHub concepts like pull requests and issues to the terminal, integrating seamlessly with Git and your code.
